# Find Ads

**Web Service Endpoint**

Finds ads within a campaign by selector criteria.

## Discussion

Use this endpoint to find `ads` within campaigns using a [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/Selector] [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/Condition] to filter results. If you don’t specify selector conditions, all [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/Ad] objects return in the response. See the [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/Ad] object for parameter descriptions and selector condition operators.

### Payload example: Find ads



## Ad Endpoints

- **Create an Ad**: Creates an ad in an ad group with a creative.
- **Find Ads (org-level)**: Fetches ads within an organization by selector criteria.
- **Get an Ad**: Fetches an ad assigned to an ad group by identifier.
- **Get All Ads**: Fetches all ads assigned to an ad group.
- **Update an Ad**: Updates an ad in an ad group.
- **Delete an Ad**: Deletes an ad from an ad group.
